<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Lcobucci\JWT\Encoding; use JsonException; use Lcobucci\JWT\Exception; use RuntimeException; final class CannotDecodeContent extends RuntimeException implements Exception { public static function jsonIssues(JsonException $previous): self { return new self(message: 'Error while decoding from JSON', previous: $previous); } public static function invalidBase64String(): self { return new self('Error while decoding from Base64Url, invalid base64 characters detected'); } }
